violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Staining/grooves at cutting board of drive through makeline.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Staff rinsed stirring spoon (used for meatballs) at hand sink faucet. -Corrected immediately.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Ice/frost build up at wire shelves, floor and vent of walk in freezer. -Walk in cooler has odor and food spill/debris at floor below shelving. -High dust at grates above walk in coolers.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
